overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player character walking through Night City. The journey begins on an elevated street with views of towering neon skyscrapers, proceeds through narrow alleys and covered market walkways, and continues past industrial ventilation systems in a dense cyberpunk urban environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated urban street with skyscraper views

events.description: turns right from open street into narrow alleyway between buildings

agents.ego_description: walking along the street and turning into a narrow alleyway next to a green industrial building

entered.detail: towering glass skyscrapers with large digital billboards and neon signage
weathered green concrete wall with industrial piping and trash accumulation
large green dumpster overflowing with garbage bags and debris
red and white automated vending machine on the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a sunlit elevated street with towering neon skyscrapers visible in the distance. The camera moves forward along a metal guardrail before turning right into a narrow alley defined by a prominent green industrial wall and scattered trash.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow service alley with descending stairs to lower level

events.description: descends concrete stairs leading down to a lower market level

agents.ego_description: walking down a narrow green-walled alley and descending stairs toward a lower market area

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking up the stairs in the opposite direction

entered.detail: large yellow downward-pointing chevrons painted on the wall indicating stairs
bright cyan neon arrow pointing right mounted on the building wall
weathered concrete stairs descending to a lower level

segments.scene_description: The camera proceeds down a narrow enclosed alley with green walls on the left and red industrial structures on the right. A neon arrow sign guides the way as the camera descends concrete stairs, passing a pedestrian coming up from the lower level.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered market walkway with food stalls and neon signage

events.description: exits narrow alley into covered market area with food stalls and shops
passing through alternating patches of sunlight and shadow under the covered walkway

agents.ego_description: walking through a bustling covered market area with various stalls and neon signs overhead

notable_agents.action: two individuals seated at a food stall eating

entered.detail: concrete overhead structure providing partial cover over the market street
illuminated pink sign with monkey logo advertising a business
red and blue automated food dispensers with illuminated displays
massive industrial ventilation fan visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the stairs, the scene opens into a semi-covered market walkway lined with food vending stalls and neon signage. The camera moves through moderate crowds under a concrete overhead structure, with a large industrial ventilation fan becoming visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial underpass with massive ventilation systems

events.description: approaching massive industrial ventilation fans with visible rotation
passing through steam or smoke emanating from ground vents

agents.ego_description: walking toward and past massive industrial ventilation structures emitting steam

notable_agents.action: black car parked along the wall near the steam vent

entered.detail: massive rotating ventilation fan built into the concrete wall structure
elevated pedestrian or utility bridge crossing over the street
ground-level vent emitting white steam or smoke across the path
street sign reading 'Creek Loop' mounted on a building corner

segments.scene_description: The walkway leads toward an industrial area dominated by massive ventilation fans built into concrete walls. The camera passes under an overhead bridge and through clouds of steam rising from ground vents, with the industrial fan growing from a distant object to an imposing nearby structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban commercial street with storefronts and vending machines

events.description: exiting industrial steam area back into open commercial street with storefronts

agents.ego_description: walking along the street passing various storefronts and automated vending machines

notable_agents.action: person standing near a storefront entrance looking at their phone

entered.detail: bright pink neon sign with triple X symbols indicating adult entertainment venue
blue automated vending machine with yellow warning stripes
large digital billboard displaying 'TENGU' and other advertisements
various shop fronts with awnings and signage at street level

segments.scene_description: Leaving the industrial steam area behind, the camera emerges onto a sunlit commercial street lined with storefronts and vending machines. Bright neon signs including a prominent pink XXX sign mark the businesses as the camera continues down the sidewalk toward distant skyscrapers.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a bright elevated street through a series of claustrophobic industrial corridors before emerging back into a sunlit commercial district. It begins along a metal guardrail with towering neon skyscrapers in the distance, before turning right into a narrow alley defined by green industrial walls and scattered trash. As the camera descends concrete stairs past a pedestrian, the enclosed space opens into a semi-covered market walkway filled with food stalls and crowds under a heavy concrete overhead. The scene then shifts toward a dense industrial zone, passing under a bridge and through clouds of rising steam as a distant ventilation fan grows into an imposing nearby structure. Finally, the camera leaves the steam behind to emerge onto a bright sidewalk lined with vending machines and pink neon signs, heading back toward the distant city skyline.
